content:
1. I began playing Morimens around the first anniversary, but it was not the first time I heard about it. I originally heard about Morimens from an ad that looked pretty fancy when I was researching about another defunct gacha game known as Criminal Girls X. It's pretty funny to me that I learned about Morimens, a game with themes about remembering, while trying to remember another game. At that time, I mainly remember finding Morimens' reddit completely empty at the time, so I didn't know what it was back then, so I just put a pin in it so I could come back later. I'm glad I did, even if it was nearly a year late from launch.
2. Aegis's story. And one of the lines the Keeper says, something along the lines of how they didn't really want anything grandiose, just to be by the side of loved ones, sitting at a campfire, growing old. That quote feels so humble and yet so touching. 
3. The story, I am always looking towards the story.
4. Absolutely love it. I do like seeing how the thought process of making stuff works in general. There's not really something specific I'm looking for, but if you have some trivia about an awakener or the story, I'd be all ears!
5. Thank you for all your efforts! Honestly, if I were in your situation and facing a situation like the shutdown, I'd probably toss in the towel, ngl. But you didn't and you made it here today, so remember that. Remember that you are remembered, that sort of thing.
谢谢你一直坚持到现在，也谢谢你的朋友曾经支持并邀请你加入。关于故事方面份期待收到啦！我们暂时没有推出换色版本幻衣的计划，希望能够优先推出更多完全不同的幻衣，更希望能够优先保障角色更新不延期。相信总有一天会做到的！
股市=>故事？
谢谢你的批评、祝愿和陪伴。我们有在尽力修复各方面的BUG，也会持续改善大家的体验。我们会努力活下去的！
那會有可能出銀芯可以兌換的幻衣嗎？(X萬銀芯回收計劃……)<:Helot_slack_off:1459092159465521184>(感覺好像是有點不可能🤣
<:doresain_proud:1468257815238938645> 所以我家杜勒...
貓還在回，他真的，我哭死（為了留言這個我願意被硬控十五分鐘）<:Helot_slack_off:1459092159465521184>

Thank you! And greetings to our card master from My Turn—its epilogue is exactly the story I wanted to share with you all.

Back in early 2022, I came across an opportunity that might have brought My Turn back. But as I mentioned in my letter, I ultimately chose to put my effort into giving this project the best possible chance to be released into the world.

Later on, we were fortunate to bring the Traphase playstyle into Morimens—this is a system I further refined based on the core gameplay I originally designed for My Turn. And we were even more fortunate to receive collaboration approval from the Feiyu, which allowed us to run the My Turn collab in Morimens. That chain of events is what ultimately led to you finding Morimens.

We’ll keep exploring what’s possible in the future. Wishing you a happy Lunar New Year and all the best!

content:
谢谢你的祝愿！我们作为中国本土的开发者，能在春节这样重要的节日里推出一个探索“中国文化 × 克苏鲁”结合的角色，我们自己也觉得非常亲切、很有意义。希望未来有合适的机会，我们还能进一步展开更多中式元素与宇宙恐怖结合的探索。

你提到的常驻活动、小玩法/肉鸽，以及相位对弈（Traphase）的后续更新，我们都有在认真听取反馈——相关的内容也正在规划和推进中。

也祝你新年顺利，欢迎随时继续把想看的内容告诉我们！

content:
Speaking of Jenkin’s story stage, here’s a small behind-the-scenes detail about the 3-star objective text.

At the time, we were still struggling to come up with the right wording, when one of our junior designers suggested: “Please remember me.” Everyone immediately loved it, so we decided to go with that.<:Jenkin_think:1459079611131494543> <:Brown_think:1459080117308620996> <:gamekey:1448943277117145140> 

I really hope we’ll have more chances to share little production stories like this with you all in the future!

1. 3 months ago! 100 active login days tomorrow, yay!! <:happy:1356053849894420683> I love Lovecraft's literature and the whole aesthetics. I found Morimens on Steam purely by chance. Then it become my main motivator to buy Cthulhu Mythos Tales and CoC books and I'm not regretting it <:pray:1356053116260454534> 

2. When Ramona read Keeper's letter. I wasn't expected the whole dialogues to be voiced too, so I wasn't prepare for emotional rollercoaster (I cried <:takenotes:1357186646294138890>) 

3. I LOVE READING MORIMENS' WORLD BUILDING, I LOVE READING STORIES so anything you guys added, I'll always gobble up like last meal <:smh:1356053161999335514> 

4. Yes, yes, very much yes. I'm waiting for Genesis Tulu's behind-the-scenes <:24_smile:1459073862544130131> (Very long time until he got releases, but I'm looking forward to it with GREAT interest <:Uvhash_power:1468258114104201451>)

5. Iconic icon, iconic music, iconic art, iconic stories, iconic characters, Morimens is one of the MOST unique gacha game I've ever experienced<:Pollux_cute:1459090749286252586> The amount of efforts and visions went into this game is pure passion of art. Thank you for continuing this project, you guys will always have our support! And nice to meet you all here! <:ramona_wisdom:1468258669341966452> 

*May the Silver Key guide us!*

Thank you!

To be honest, early on we hoped every chapter could have the same scope of story cinematics as Chapter 1. Our artists and writers went through countless rounds of revisions and polish to get that finale right.

We’re extremely proud of the result—but to make sure we could deliver the full game, we had to adjust the scope later on.

So whenever we hear that Chapter 1 moved someone, it really means a lot to us. It reminds us that all that effort was worth it.<:question1:1356085150869622965> <:scared1:1356053141816213507> 

I’m really glad you liked it too.

I’m sorry we can’t respond to every single thread and give everyone a fully satisfying answer. We truly want to, but with limited team bandwidth it isn’t always possible. Thank you for your understanding.

Regarding Ryker’s kit: yes—we do recognize there are parts of his current design that aren’t working as intended. We’re already exploring a revised direction in our JP build, and we’ll use what we learn there to inform how we can improve things elsewhere.

For the global version, making big changes within the existing framework and balance is genuinely difficult, especially while respecting players who are used to the current kit. One idea we’re actively considering (still in the design stage) is a system that lets awakeners switch between different skill kits. That would allow us to rework Ryker more thoroughly, while also letting players keep the original kit if they prefer.

We hear you, and Ryker is on our radar.<:ryker_Showoff:1468258591650873387>
在校貓看到我的留言之前瘋狂修改，反正還沒到我🤓(？

That “will” scene moved us deeply as well, so later on we used our limited budget to add voice acting for it. If you haven’t revisited the scene since then, please give it another look with the voice—it’s definitely worth it.

And truly, thank you for loving the game. Players like you are exactly what keeps us moving forward.<:gamekey:1448943277117145140> <:ramona_wisdom:1468258669341966452>

很抱歉，新活动确实还有很多不够成熟的地方。我们会认真复盘、吸取经验，在后续持续改进。也非常感谢你在这种情况下仍然愿意腾出宝贵时间，为我们留下这些文字。

关于终章那段最终战：我自己完整体验之后，当时就鼓励团队——虽然那段时间我们走得非常艰苦，但我相信我们做出了很不一样的东西。即使商业成绩未必算成功，它依然值得我们挺起胸膛。

我也一直认为，终章战斗里那种最深、最复杂的情感，只能来自于你一路经历了所有战斗、亲自游玩与挑战、在当下的音乐里推进剧情、把情绪一步步走到终点的过程；仅仅“观看剧情”是很难复现的。能听到你一口气打完并且喜欢这段体验，我真的很开心。

至于徐：我们原本也想过请上海话配音，但最终综合一致性、预算和版本周期等因素，只能先放弃这个计划。谢谢你喜欢这些更细小的地域风情设计！我会转告剧本作家团队的！

最后也感谢你的批评与提醒。我会继续努力，带着团队一起变得更加成熟，把游戏做得更好。

content:
We’ve already been actively monitoring and collecting feedback in various places, and since the mode has only been out for a short time, we’ve actually gathered enough information for now—so we don’t have plans to open an additional round of feedback collection in the near term.

That said, we’ll keep working hard and continue bringing more fun content to the game!

A Keeper from Steam! Even though I didn’t mention Steam in my post, I’m genuinely grateful to the Steam platform—it greatly increased our chances and helped more players discover us.

Thank you so much for your support. We’ll keep working hard!

Could that be possible for the realm mastery mechanic? i feel like realm mastery could be more interesting, maybe changing the effect depending on the number of characters from each realm and having effects for mixing realms, but i also think that being able to change the effect of realm mastery would be interesting, like choosing if realm mastery gives tentacle dmg, tentacle gathering or more shield for tentacles.

I want to share a little story.

G-Ramona is absolutely one of the character stories I relate to the most.

Morimens isn’t the first game I’ve made. In the past, my team and I tried our best to save the worlds we created—but unfortunately, those attempts didn’t work out. Still, I believe that as long as we keep getting stronger and keep learning from every attempt—from our work, and from our players—none of it is meaningless.

That’s why I personally designed her kit, and why I wrote the final line in the PV :

“No matter how many times I fail, I will save you in the end.”

In a way, that single sentence from the 1.1 PV is our answer to failure. As long as we’re still standing, we won’t give up.

In the real world, the past is the past—some things we can’t change anymore. But today, all we hope for is that Ramona (Morimens) can reunite with its Keepers (you), and that we can fulfill the promise mentioned in Ramona’s SpecOp.

谢谢你的反馈！

对于哪些奖励适合作为基础目标、哪些奖励适合作为荣誉奖励这个问题我们会继续研究和探索合适的答案。

也很高兴你确实感受到了减负带来的好处，我们确实希望大家能够更多比例的自主掌握游戏节奏。

我们同样希望推出尽可能多元的角色，你的愿望我们收到了！会研究的！

content:
谢谢你写下这么长的一段，也愿意把你的经历分享给我们。

虽然《忘却前夜》的整体氛围是黑暗与绝望的，但我们从未放弃对“人性微光”的刻画。我们也不希望眼泪与痛苦只是痛苦本身，而是希望在它们的衬托下，那些爱、正义与希望会显得更加珍贵。也希望这些故事能在你经历巨变与低谷的时候，哪怕只是一点点，陪你走过来；也祝你接下来的日子能慢慢变得更好。

有人说“电影不仅仅是故事，更是扩展了我们的人生”。我想游戏也是一样的。听到你分享这段心路历程，我们非常触动，也更深刻地感受到作为创作者的责任。而你能如此珍视、喜爱拉蒙娜，我们真的非常开心。<:ramona_wisdom:1468258669341966452> 

看到大家对幕后故事，以及“融蚀之前的世界”/“If世界”这么感兴趣，我也很兴奋——如果未来有合适的机会，我们一定希望继续和大家分享更多。

至于周边规划，也想和你说明一下：实体周边的容错率非常低，一旦出错没办法像线上内容那样打个补丁就能修好；同时还要面对制作成本、库存与物流等现实压力。我们这次周边在质量把控和交付上也经历了不少波折，所以相比立刻拓展更多品类，我们更希望先把手上的少数几件事做到足够好。但你的愿望我们收到了——我也真心希望有一天，我们能做出更多周边，让这些故事在现实生活里也能继续陪伴大家。

最后，再次感谢你对《忘却前夜》的热情支持。我们会努力活下去，也会努力做得更好。
很遗憾，目前没能安排更多规划。但我们始终记着这个问题！<:Doll_Inferno_ha:1459091434958360760>
